scripts.dev:extension: npm run native:install -w main && npm run dev:extension -w main
scripts.build:extension: npm run build:extension -w main && npm run native:install -w main
scripts.dev:tauri: concurrently -k "npm run dev:desktop-renderer -w main" "wait-on tcp:4173 && cd tauri-app && cargo tauri dev"
scripts.build:tauri: npm run build:desktop-renderer -w main && cd tauri-app && cargo tauri build
